nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Black-winged saltator
nodes.summary: The black-winged saltator (Saltator atripennis) is a species of songbird found in Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. While saltators were traditionally placed in the family Cardinalidae, they are now placed in the tanager family Thraupidae. References External links Black-winged Saltator videos on the Internet Bird Collection Black-winged Saltator photo gallery Archived 3 March 2016 at the Wayback Machine VIREO Photo-High Res--(Close-up) Archived 3 March 2016 at the Wayback Machine

nodes.name: 菲利普·斯克莱特
nodes.summary: 菲利普·斯克莱特是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联79种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、褐穴䳍、巴氏穴䳍等79种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。
